title: inference.put_ai21

task_type.description: The type of the inference task that the model will perform.

ai21_inference_id.description: The unique identifier of the inference endpoint.

timeout.description: Specifies the amount of time to wait for the inference endpoint to be created.

service.description: The type of service supported for the specified task type. In this case, `ai21`.

service_settings.description: Settings used to install the inference model. These settings are specific to the `ai21` service.

description:
Create a AI21 inference endpoint.

Create an inference endpoint to perform an inference task with the `ai21` service.
